metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters plHabilita

Local lnI

If Type('plHabilita') # 'L'
	plHabilita = .F.
Endif

*!*	With Thisform.ParentForm.Pagina.Lista
*!*		For lnI=1 to .Grupo_Op.ButtonCount
*!*			If .Grupo_Op.Buttons(lnI).BaseClass = 'Commandbutton' And .Grupo_Op.Buttons(lnI).Visible
*!*				.Grupo_Op.Buttons(lnI).Enabled = plHabilita
*!*			EndIf
*!*		EndFor
*!*		.cmdFPOper.Enabled = plHabilita
*!*		.Grupo_Saida.Sair.Enabled = plHabilita
*!*	EndWith

LParameters poForm, pnDataSes, pcEscolha, pcEmps, pcDopes, pnNumes

Set DataSession to pnDataSes

Thisform.ParentForm = poForm
Thisform.PcEscolha  = pcEscolha
Thisform.ParentForm.Enabled  = .F.

ThisForm.pcEdn = pcEmps + pcDopes + Str(pnNumes,6)

With Thisform
	.Caption = 'Cotaçőes ' + AllTrim( Proper( ThisForm.pcEdn ) )
	
*!*		.Top     = Thisform.ParentForm.Top + Thisform.ParentForm.Pagina.Lista.Grade.Top + 50
*!*		.Left    = Thisform.ParentForm.Left + ;
*!*				   Thisform.ParentForm.Pagina.Lis... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.ParentForm.ParentForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'CrListaRemota', 'CMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = CrListaRemota.CMoes
	Replace Descrs With CrListaRemota.DMoes in LocalCtMoe
	Use In CrListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.... [TRUNCADO]

Select LocalCtMoe
If Not Eof()
	Thisform.lHouveExcl = .T.
	Delete
	Skip
	Skip - 1
Endif
Thisform.GradeSubN.Refresh

If Thisform.cmdInserir.Visible Or Thisform.cmdExcluir.Visible
	If ( Thisform.lHouveExcl Or Thisform.lHouveIns )
		Select LocalCtMoe
		Go Bottom
		Go Top
		
		Select cMoes,sum(1) as TT From LocalCtMoe GROUP by 1 Into cursor Totais
		Select Totais
		Scan
			If TT > 1
				MessageBox('Moedas '+Alltrim(Totais.cMoes)+' Digitada em Duplicidade!!!!',0+16,'Atençăo')
				Return .f.
			EndIf
		EndScan
		
		Select CrSIGPRCTC
		Zap
		Select LocalCtMoe
		Scan
			Scatter Memvar
			If Empty(m.cMoes)
				Loop
		... [TRUNCADO]

Thisform.lHouveIns = .T.

Select LocalCtMoe
Locate for EmpDopNums = ThisForm.pcEdn And CMoes = ' '
If Eof()
	Insert Into LocalCtMoe(EmpDopNums, pkChaves) Values (ThisForm.pcEdn,fUniqueIds())
EndIf

Select LocalCtMoe
Thisform.GradeSubN.Column1.SetFocus

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select cMoes,sum(1) as TT From LocalCtMoe GROUP by 1 Into cursor Totais
